moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: General UK
angles.copy: Get ready to soak up the sun! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, bringing us the longest day of 2026. How are you making the most of the extra daylight? #SummerSolstice

angles.name: Early Morning
angles.copy: The sun rises on the Summer Solstice tomorrow at 9:24 AM BST – the official moment of the longest day. Perfect for an early start or late finish!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage continues across North America, with matches running daily and England playing Panama on June 27th.

angles.name: General Update
angles.copy: Another day, another set of World Cup clashes! Who are you backing in today's group stage fixtures? #FIFAWorldCup2026

angles.name: England Focus
angles.copy: England fans, get ready! The Three Lions are back in World Cup action on June 27th against Panama. How are your nerves holding up?

moments.title: Gallagher Premiership Final: Exeter Chiefs
moments.blurb: Exeter Chiefs face Northampton Saints today in the Gallagher Premiership Rugby final at Twickenham Stadium, kicking off at 3 PM BST.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's FINAL DAY! Our very own Exeter Chiefs battle Northampton Saints for the Gallagher Premiership title at Twickenham. Come on you Chiefs! #PremRugbyFinal #ExeterChiefs

angles.name: Local Support
angles.copy: Devon is behind you, Chiefs! Tune in from 3 PM BST to watch Exeter take on Northampton in the biggest game of the season. Where are you watching?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival continues through Sunday, June 21st, featuring headliners like Calvin Harris tonight and The Cure tomorrow.

angles.name: Saturday Headliner
angles.copy: Calvin Harris takes over the Isle of Wight Festival main stage tonight! Who's there and ready to dance? #IOW2026 #CalvinHarris

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival is in full swing! What's been your highlight so far from the epic lineup, including Lewis Capaldi and The Cure?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Continues in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is buzzing as TRNSMT Festival hosts Kasabian tonight, with Lewis Capaldi set to headline on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Saturday Headliner
angles.copy: TRNSMT is rockin' Glasgow Green! Tonight, Kasabian takes the stage. Who's catching them live? #TRNSMT2026 #Kasabian

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: It's a huge weekend in Glasgow! TRNSMT Festival continues with Kasabian tonight and Lewis Capaldi wrapping things up tomorrow. What's been your favourite set?

moments.title: Taylor Swift Tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is the UK's number one single, achieving the biggest week of sales in three years for the week ending June 25th.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Queen of the charts! Taylor Swift is Number 1 in the UK with 'I Knew It, I Knew You' AND had the biggest sales week in three years. Incredible!

angles.name: Pop Culture News
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the latest Official Singles Chart? Taylor Swift is dominating at Number 1. What's your favourite track from the current Top 40?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your all-time favourite Lionel track? #LionelRichie #HappyBirthday

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, Lionel Richie turns 77 today. Celebrate with us by playing his timeless hits!

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday John Taylor
moments.blurb: Duran Duran bassist and co-founder John Taylor celebrates his 66th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary John Taylor of Duran Duran! What's your favourite Duran Duran song to blast out? #JohnTaylor #DuranDuran

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon today! John Taylor, bassist for Duran Duran, turns 66. Get those classic hits on rotation!

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday Michael Anthony
moments.blurb: Former Van Halen bassist and rock icon Michael Anthony celebrates his 72nd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the incredible Michael Anthony, former bassist of Van Halen! What's your favourite Van Halen track? #MichaelAnthony #VanHalen

angles.name: Hard Rock Legend
angles.copy: A true legend of hard rock, Michael Anthony turns 72 today! Crank up those classic Van Halen riffs in his honour.

moments.title: Wales Hosts UEFA U19 EURO Finals
moments.blurb: Wales is set to host the UEFA Under-19 European Championship finals across North Wales, with matches kicking off on Sunday, June 28th.

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Huge news for Welsh football! We're hosting the UEFA U19 EURO finals starting June 28th across North Wales. Get ready to cheer on the next generation! #Cymru #U19EURO

angles.name: Upcoming Fixtures
angles.copy: The UEFA U19 EURO Finals are almost here! Wales takes on nine-time winners Spain in their opening match on Sunday, June 28th, at the Racecourse Ground.

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Concludes
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5, following Jeremy Clarkson's farming adventures, premiered on Prime Video on June 17th.

angles.name: Catch Up TV
angles.copy: Have you caught up with the final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 yet? More chaos and triumphs from Diddly Squat Farm! #ClarksonsFarm #PrimeVideo

angles.name: What's Next?
angles.copy: Season 5 of Clarkson's Farm wrapped up this week. What were your thoughts on Jeremy's latest farming challenges?

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: The new series of Love Island (Season 13) continues, bringing daily drama from the villa.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupling up and who's on the rocks? Tune in tonight! #LoveIsland

angles.name: Daily Gossip
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island Season 13? The villa is heating up! What's been the biggest shocker so far?
